calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Corey Evans, Esq., Law Offices of, 510-548-7382, for petitioners and moving parties Indefense of animals and Elliot Katz
Chrstopher Patti, Esq., Offices of General Counsel, 510-987-9739, for The Regents of the University of California

RULING:
A R G U E D; PETITIONER INDEFENSE OF ANIMALS and ELLIOT KATZ' MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE is granted and denied in part. Repondent produced documents the day before this hearing. The Court finds that these documents would not have been produced unless this petition was filed. However, the Court rules that Petitioner will not receive the individual names of the Regents employees just because the USDA filed a complaint. Petitioner is entitled to reasonable attorney's fees as the prevailing party under the Public Records Act. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
